title: The Essential Datapack
description: be able to craft uncraftable items
body:
have you ever wanted to craft uncraftable items, or smelt unsmeltable items? in this specific datapack, you can craft:

A Trident

Enchanted Golden Apple (2 recipes)

Totem Of Undying

a cheaper Dandelion Suspicious Stew (with 40 tick saturation effect)

bottles of enchanting

and a villager spawn egg.

you can also cook:
Rotten Flesh using a campfire, furnace or smoker.

All Raw Ore Blocks into Blocks of every item (Gold, Iron & Copper)
Recipes in Gallery.
Recipe Videos, see this folder:
[https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1T0xpaXN5g5xzvhJKZmA9m5TCn7Eiv67z?usp=drive_link](https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1T0xpaXN5g5xzvhJKZmA9m5TCn7Eiv67z?usp=drive_link)
